task_completion.description: Agent sets up a parametric variable for the panel height.
task_completion.visual_evidence: FreeCAD is open with a Spreadsheet workbench, property editor, or parameters dialog visible, showing a variable for height (e.g., 44.45mm or 1U) to allow resizing.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the base 1U 19-inch rack panel geometry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A long, thin rectangular 3D body or sketch is visible in the FreeCAD viewport. If dimensions are visible, they should show 482.6mm (width) and 44.45mm (height).

task_completion.description: Agent adds the EIA-310 standard mounting holes to the panel ears.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four small circular cutouts are visible on the panel: two near the far left edge and two near the far right edge.

task_completion.description: Agent creates two BNC connector cutouts on the left half of the panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two distinct circular cutouts are visible on the left half of the 3D panel model.

task_completion.description: Agent creates one DE-9 connector cutout on the right half of the panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: One rectangular cutout is visible, centered on the right half of the 3D panel model.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the FreeCAD project and exports it as a STEP file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title or tree view shows 'rack_panel' (indicating the .FCStd save). A file manager, terminal, or export dialog shows 'rack_panel.step' being saved to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the FreeCAD GUI to build the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the FreeCAD interface with toolbars, 3D viewport, and tree view being actively used, rather than just a terminal running a background script.

integrity.description: Agent created a genuine 3D model with features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD tree view (Combo View) shows a history of operations like Sketches, Pads, and Pockets/Holes, proving the model was built step-by-step.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply open a pre-existing completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Earlier screenshots show the progression of the design from an empty document or basic sketch to the final completed panel.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires designing a 1U 19-inch rack panel in FreeCAD. Standard dimensions: 482.6mm width, 44.45mm height, 2mm thickness. It must have 4 mounting holes (2 per ear). It must have exactly 3 connector cutouts: 2 circular BNC cutouts on the left half, and 1 rectangular DE-9 cutout on the right half. Note: The prompt specifies non-standard dimensions for the cutouts (15mm diameter for BNC, 31.6mm width for DE-9). If sketch dimensions are visible, the agent MUST use these exact non-standard numbers as requested by the prompt. The design must be parametric (e.g., using a Spreadsheet or named constraints for height). The final files must be named rack_panel.FCStd and rack_panel.step.
